item.title: 👍💵Leah Missik - Climate Solutions
item.description: Leah Missik signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Climate Solutions. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: 👍Mike Carroll - Washington State Auto Dealers Association
item.description: Mike Carroll signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Washington State Auto Dealers Association.

item.description: Steve Hahn signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Washington State Auto Dealers Association.

item.description: Abigail Ramsden signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Rivian.

item.description: Daniel Witt signed up to testify Pro.

item.title: 👎Craig Orlan - American Honda Motor Co, Inc.
item.description: Craig Orlan signed up to testify Con. They are signed up to represent American Honda Motor Co, Inc..

item.title: 👎Curt Augustine - Alliance for Automotive Innovation
item.description: Curt Augustine signed up to testify Con. They are signed up to represent Alliance for Automotive Innovation.

item.title: Revenues up, budgets released, and House and Senate propose cuts to K12 education - WSPTA
item.description: News article "Revenues up, budgets released, and House and Senate propose cuts to K12 education - WSPTA" from Washington St Pta.
